recommendations.title: Champagne !
recommendations.overview: Springtime in the French vineyards of Champagne. Patrick has gathered his oldest friends for his bachelor party. The trouble is, everyone hates his future wife. This could thus become one hellish weekend in gourmet paradise.

recommendations.title: Racing Extinction
recommendations.overview: An unlikely team of activists and innovators hatches a bold mission to save endangered species.

recommendations.title: The Book of Life

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: Two young boys, Valerio and Christian, form a powerful friendship over the summer.

recommendations.title: Fan-Fan the Tulip

recommendations.title: Indie Game: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Follows the dramatic journeys of video game developers as they create and release their games to the world. It's about making video games, but at its core, it's about the creative process, and exposing yourself through your work.
